name: Revolver
description:
The Revolver is an early-game handgun and is guaranteed to drop from Knuckle Dragger on first kill. As a Jakobs pistol, it fires at the rate you can pull the trigger, complete with the signature fanning-style firing animation.

Base performance depends on the barrel: Tediore gives no change; Maliwan slightly boosts accuracy; Bandit/Scav raises damage but lowers accuracy; Dahl improves accuracy and recoil recovery while reducing damage, and also cuts recoil.
notes: Can also appear from any appropriate loot source. Blue rarity versions are called the Wheelgun and use the same part pool. The gun cannot roll elemental damage, but a Maliwan barrel still increases elemental status effect damage bonuses.
